compiled_state.title: Update project-setup SKILL.md to add gh verification and fallback paths
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Unit Test Exemption: skill files (per AC library)

Update SKILL.md Sub-step D to call gh-availability-check.sh before any gh variable/secret operations. Route to appropriate path based on GH_STATUS.

## Implementation
- Before Sub-step D: run gh-availability-check.sh
- GH_STATUS=authenticated: proceed with gh variable set / gh secret set as normal
- GH_STATUS=not_authenticated: print manual gh commands from script output, skip gh operations
- GH_STATUS=not_installed: print UI navigation steps from script output, skip gh operations

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md references gh-availability-check.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'gh-availability-check.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md documents all 3 fallback paths
  Verify: grep -q 'not_authenticated\|not authenticated' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md && grep -q 'not_installed\|not installed' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — gh-availability-check.sh outputs GH_STATUS=authenticated|not_authenticated|not_installed and FALLBACK=commands|ui_steps. Sub-step D starts at line 953.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: SKILL.md updated ✓ — Added gh availability check block before Sub-step D authenticated path. All 3 routes (authenticated/not_authenticated/not_installed) documented. B1-B8 and credential detection sections untouched.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Syntax verified ✓ — B1-B8 at lines 870-929 unchanged. New gh check block at lines 953-987. All 3 GH_STATUS routes present. Markdown structure valid.
